visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with her hair in two buns, wearing a blue zip-up hoodie and matching cargo-style joggers, runs excitedly down a brightly lit white hallway toward the camera. She holds a white plate of curry rice with both hands, her mouth wide open in a joyous shout. The hallway is narrow with wooden doors on either side and a marble-patterned floor. (2) The scene cuts to a medium close-up of a man with messy black hair, wearing a black and white patterned knit sweater over a white t-shirt. He is sitting in a warmly lit indoor living room, eating curry from a similar plate with a spoon. He takes a large bite, closes his eyes in satisfaction, and then tilts his head back with a look of pure bliss. (3) Back to the woman in the hallway; she is now standing closer to the camera, laughing uncontrollably with her hands pressed against her cheeks. Her expression is one of extreme excitement and delight. The background remains the same brightly lit residential corridor. (4) The video cuts back to the man, who now appears overwhelmed with emotion, leaning back against a couch with his hand on his head. Large red Japanese text and smaller Chinese subtitles appear as overlays on the screen. (5) The woman is shown again in a different setting, wearing a white lace top with floral patterns. She smiles broadly, points her finger toward the camera, and waves her hands in the air. Behind her is a white board with the word 'baby' and some Japanese characters. (6) The final phase shows the woman again running down the hallway with the plate of curry, mirroring the opening shot. She has a huge, ecstatic smile. Text overlays in Chinese appear at the bottom of the frame.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Slogan]: 結婚してくれ. [Subtitle]: (嫁給我吧). (2) [Subtitle]: (把戒指戴上吧😍). (3) [Subtitle]: 這笑容... (4) [Subtitle]: 緯嘉看過嗎😏.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main creator appearing in most scenes, 1 male actor (Sato Takeru) appearing in cutaway scenes.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with two hair buns, wearing a blue tracksuit and later a white lace top. A young Asian man with dark hair, wearing a patterned knit sweater.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A clean, modern white hallway with light wood doors and marble floors; an indoor living room with a beige sofa and light-colored curtains; a studio-like setting with a white board and green wall.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with high-tempo, upbeat comedy BGM featuring brassy synthesizer stabs and a driving drum beat. Footsteps are faintly audible underneath the music. (2) A male voice exclaims 'Umai!' with high arousal and positive valence, followed by a short burst of background laughter. The music continues at a steady volume. (3) A female voice laughs heartily, layered over the existing upbeat BGM track. The pitch is high and the tone is purely joyful. (4) The audio transitions with a hard cut to a more dramatic musical phrase. A male voice delivers the line 'Kekkon shite kure' with a deep, earnest, and slightly melodramatic pitch. (5) A triumphant fanfare-style SFX sounds, and a female voice excitedly shouts 'Wo zhunbei hao le!' in Mandarin with very clear articulation and high energy. (6) The video concludes with the initial upbeat, high-tempo BGM swelling in volume to a peak before fading out quickly.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a humorous meme where the female creator imagines a famous actor (Sato Takeru) proposing to her because he is so impressed by her cooking (curry rice). It uses existing footage of the actor eating and pairs it with her excited reactions to create a comedic 'fan-girl' fantasy scenario.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video utilizes a popular Japanese actor's footage (likely Sato Takeru) to create a self-deprecating comedy bit about being single and obsessed with celebrities.
